title: Celebrating Appalachia
description:
Welcome! Glad you stopped by and hope you stop by often as I celebrate my Appalachian Heritage.

My name is Tipper Pressley. I was born and raised in the mountains of Western North Carolina. I’ve always had a great love and appreciation for my rich Appalachian culture and heritage. In March of 2008 I started the Blind Pig & the Acorn blog in an effort to preserve and celebrate Appalachia.

This channel will continue my endeavor of celebrating the rich culture and heritage of the Appalachian Mountains.

title: Paige Lorenze
description:
Hi, I’m Paige! I’m a 28 year old founder and content creator rooted in New England. I grew up between Vermont and Connecticut, which shaped so much of my love for home, tradition, and building something lasting. After college in New York City, I returned to Connecticut, where I now balance a grounded home life with traveling the world alongside my boyfriend, Tommy Paul, who plays professional tennis.

This space is where I share the intersection of business, home, travel, and the in between moments in longer format (my fav). I’m so grateful you’re here and I hope maybe it makes you feel inspired to build a life that feels entirely your own.

xo,
Paige

title: The Chateau Diaries
description:
Back in 2005, I bought the Chateau de Lalande with my two best friends, Nic and Michael. Filled with optimism, we had no idea what epic adventures (and spiralling costs!) lay ahead. But little by little we tackled the renovation of this 16th century historic building, and filled it with friends and family from all over the world.

Now, thanks to the viewers of this YouTube channel, and the patrons of The Chateau Diaries, Lalande is undergoing a renaissance. The chateau and its gardens are springing back to life, with a lot of hard work, set-backs, triumphs and - most of all - laughter, along the way...

To support The Chateau Diaries and receive an extra video per week, check out our Patreon page: https://www.patreon.com/thechateaudiaries

To stay as a guest, please go to our reservations page on www.chateaudelalande.com

For sponsorship enquiries, please contact chateaudiaries@zigguratxyz.com

title: Elsa Rhae & Barron
description:
My name's Elsa Rhae, editor and operator of this channel. My husband, Barron, and I lived 6 years in our 13ft Scamp trailer living well below our means and saving all our income in order to purchase 40 acres of off-grid land in the Colorado high-Rockies. We are currently building our very own off-grid home in the mountains. Join us!

Barron is a web developer and outdoorsman. I am a video editor and artist. We utilize technology to live off the grid, powered only by solar. Check out our write up on Apple.com! https://www.apple.com/final-cut-pro/workflows/

Don't forget to grab a copy of Barron's book, Normal to Nomad! https://normal2nomad.com !!

Follow our other social media accounts to stay up to date:
Instagram: @elsarhae @barronlink
HTTPS://elsarhae.com

title: Self Sufficient Me
description:
I have written a book! https://www.briobooks.store/products/100-top-crops-you-can-grow

Hi, learn organic gardening, realistic self-sufficient living, keeping quail, chickens, and lots more! My channel is about self-sufficiency and based on my blog (established several years earlier) called "Self Sufficient Me" this doesn't mean I believe I am totally self-sufficient (nor do I want to be) but more that I want to "strive" to be as self-sufficient as I can with the current resources I have on offer. 

Thank you for subscribing!

Look, and see the Earth through her eyes... metaphorically means trying to work WITH nature rather than forcing it artificially.

title: thepressleygirls
description:
Welcome to our home in the mountains of Western North Carolina. 🌄 💜
My name is Corie and my twin sister is Katie. We’re sharing our journey of simple living, Appalachian life, music, gardening and making jewelry all while trying our best to Honor God our Creator and Reflect the values of his Son Jesus Christ. 
Whether we’re playing a tune, working in the garden, cooking in the kitchen or sharing something God has laid on our hearts, our hope is that you will feel like the family that we consider you to be. We want anyone and everyone who wants to, to be part of our journey. We believe in honoring God and our family while holding onto the traditions of our Appalachian culture. So pull up a chair and join our family as we learn, grow and stay rooted in what matters most.

title: Jeanelleats
description:
For business-related inquiries, please send me an email.

WELCOME. My name is Jeanelle, and I'm here to share with you delicious foods from around the world. My foundation is in Filipino food, and my favorite thing to do is to introduce someone to their NEW favorite dish!

There's no hard line between dishes from different cultures; there's a common thread between foods from all areas of the world. No such thing as “authentic” food either.  If it's made with good intentions and tastes AMAZING, I'm all for it!

I also love to travel to explore food from other cultures to learn about food history and how it show up in our world today. Thanks for watching!

title: Building a Dream
description:
Join me as I build myself a home out of sea containers on my bushland property!

Welcome to 'Building a Dream', the nature-based DIY channel where I share all the knowledge, tips and skills I pick up on my journey of building a house out of sea containers using a sustainable and economical approach. 

The dream I'm building doesn't stop at a container house! You can expect to see various projects take place here from tiny houses to intricate water management system to secret gardens. 

I'm Jasmin (with my best mate Jango) and a year ago I had never used a power tool in my life, I'm here to give you the confidence to give it a crack and show you that if I can do it, you can too! 

Hit SUBSCRIBE to join my journey of DIY discovery at my home amongst the grass trees.

title: Dainty Diaries
description:
Welcome to Dainty Diaries! 

My name is Catherine, and welcome to my floral, painted, tea-dress-wearing, creative corner of YouTube! Here, I share my passion for all things DIY, upcycling, home décor, crafting, and cottage garden inspiration. Whether it’s drilling, sewing, photography, or videography, I embrace every aspect of creativity. My goal is to inspire you with DIY projects, budget-friendly ideas, and beautiful transformations that help flex your creative muscles. Join me as I turn ordinary into extraordinary, one project at a time!

Want to know more about me?
Visit my blog: http://www.daintydressdiaries.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/daintydressdiaries/?hl=en

I upload every Thursday and some Sunday, too. 

Order my book here: 
New book: https://www.bookstation.ie/product/heart-home-craft-and-diy-projects-to-bring-love-into-your-home-and-garden-from-the-creator-of-dainty-dress-diaries/
Signed copy of my first book: https://obrien.ie/dainty-dress-diaries

title: CRAZY MIDDLES
description:
Welcome to Crazy Middles! We are a big and loving family with  22 amazing children!

From the very beginning, our mission has been to provide a loving  home for children in need, and our family has grown exponentially through the power of adoption. Each child brings their own unique personality, talents, and dreams, making every day an adventure filled with laughter, love, and cherished memories.

But our channel is not just about our family; it's about spreading awareness and promoting the importance of adoption. We aim to inspire and educate others about the beauty of providing a forever home to children who long for love and stability. We hope that by sharing our story, we can encourage others to consider adoption and make a positive difference in the lives of children worldwide.

Hit the subscribe button and be a part of our loving family! Don't forget to click the notification bell, so you never miss an update!
For business inquires: crazymiddles@thestation.io

title: laguerita70 (laguerita70)
description: Welcome to my channel! I use my channel to show the world what we went through before, during and after my husband's deportation from the USA. I want to bring awareness to the family separation that occurs due to deportation and show you the side of Mexico that the media never shows. I answer your questions surrounding our experience, tell you stories, show you our lives and all of the beautiful parts of the place we now call home. Enjoy and don't forget to subscribe!
